title: Automating Obsidian Templater to Append Fleeting Thoughts
first_prompt: Is there a way to have Obsidian Templater move content in a bulleted list in one section of a template (deliniated by a H3) into an existing file in another folder? I want to take bulleted items in my
summary: Irwin was attempting to automate the process of extracting and appending bulleted "Fleeting Thoughts" from a specific section of his Daily Template into an external archive file. After initially encountering resistance regarding filesystem access, the assistant provided and customized JavaScript code for the Templater plugin to handle the content movement. They ultimately concluded that the script needed to be saved as a dedicated file within the top-level `scripts` folder, requiring Irwin to update his Daily Template to call the function using the syntax `<% await tp.user.moveFleetingThoughts() %>`.
